LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TED HULBUSH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. PARAGRAPH 4 ALLEGES THAT HULBUSH OWNS OR IS RESPONSIBLE FOR MAMANGING THE BUILDING. THE GRANT DEED MAY BE BUT IS NOT NECESSARILY INCONSISTENT WITH THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT. MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS TED HULBUSH AND PACIFIC EQUITY ONE, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the motion is granted. Plaintiff does not have standing to assert claims on behalf of other tenants. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

PARAGRAPH 4 ALLEGES THAT HULBUSH OWNS OR IS RESPONSIBLE FOR MAMANGING THE BUILDING. THE GRANT DEED MAY BE BUT IS NOT NECESSARILY INCONSISTENT WITH THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT.
